title.en: Time flies, and thousands of years have passed.

content.en:
Time flies, and thousands of years have passed.

In the past, tens of millions of years may not have been a long time, and a Heavenly Monarch would have exceeded this time by retreating once.

But now, in the quasi-dao realm where there are countless opportunities, tens of millions of years are relatively long, and the changes in the entire quasi-dao realm are naturally incomparably greater.

At this time, there were too many half-step true ancestors in the Quasi-Dao Realm!

For the true monarchs, it is like a shackle, but in this era, it is easy to break, too many true monarchs who could not be promoted to the half-step True Ancestor realm in the past have used the opportunity to break the shackles and be promoted to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

It can be said that any force can easily take out hundreds of half-step true ancestors, and even the human race has given birth to several half-step true ancestors.

Several half-step True Ancestors of the Human Race all used the innate origin life bestowed by Ye Tian to break the shackles and be promoted to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

Although the half-step True Ancestor promoted in this way has some flaws, the powerhouses of the human race don't care, after all, they have no hope of being promoted to Dao Ancestor in the future, and they are naturally happy to have the opportunity to be promoted to become a True Ancestor and become a real big man.

In the past, the opportunity to promote a half-step True Ancestor was enough to cause countless True Monarchs to fight, and even the disciples of the Dao Ancestor would be moved!

It is worth mentioning that Ye Tian spent a huge price to buy a reincarnation thing, not a reincarnation seed, but a reincarnation leaf, which is a leaf on the reincarnation tree, which also has a reincarnation effect, but it is not as good as a reincarnation seed.

Creatures reincarnated using the leaf of reincarnation will not have a good talent in the future.

But Ye Tian didn't care about this at all, he could give talent at will, so this defect almost didn't exist.

He gave the leaf of reincarnation to his sister Ye Yu, so that his sister was also reincarnated, and now he has cultivated to the realm of gods again.

And Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, is now the ultimate powerhouse of the Heavenly Monarch, and her foundation is extremely deep, if she had to create the strongest foundation, she would have already stepped into the ranks of the True Monarch.

And Ye Tian's own progress is also relatively large, and his soul and the Great Dao have already fused into three.

"It's a pity that the half-step True Ancestor realm can't improve the strength of the physical body!"

Ye Tian sighed.

The half-step True Ancestor realm is not to improve the realm of divine power and physical body, but to enhance the power of the divine soul, with the fusion of the Great Dao and the divine soul, the divine soul is getting stronger and stronger, and the control of the body is getting stronger and stronger, so the strength exerted is naturally more and more terrifying.

For example, Ye Tian's strength has not improved much, but his strength has at least doubled.

"Little junior brother, come to the meeting!"

A message came from Ryuhae Zhenjun.

After Ye Tian received it, he instantly shuttled through the space and came to the Void Heaven Palace.

-----------

Void Heaven Temple, conference hall.

A True Monarch with a name in the Half-Step True Ancestor Realm came here, the total number was almost thousands, if it was in the past, it would be impossible for the Void Heaven One Pulse to have so many half-step True Ancestors.

After all, it took a long time for the Void Heaven to be able to give birth to a True Ancestor, and it would already be an exaggeration to be able to have ten half-step True Ancestors at the same time in the same era.

And now, thousands of half-step true ancestors are gathered together, what a terrifying thing!

Ye Tian and Longhai Zhenjun could be said to be the highest level of the Void Heaven Palace, but they were not the ones who presided over this meeting.

Rumble!!!

A wisp of Dao Ancestor's breath burst out.

The next moment, an incarnation of a Dao Ancestor descended.

But this Dao Ancestor is not the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor has been in retreat somewhere in the battlefield ruins, and he still hasn't come out.

At this time, the Dao Ancestor who came down was named Yuanqi Dao Ancestor, and he was a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

But Yuanqi Dao Ancestor is already a Dao Ancestor, even if Ye Tian and he are senior brothers, they can't be called senior brothers, but they are called Dao Ancestors to show respect for them.

"I've seen the Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor!"

Many half-step True Ancestors said respectfully.

The Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor was a Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the incarnation he descended could not even defeat Ye Tian, but no one dared to disrespect him.

After the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor of the Yuan Qi came, he looked around and said: "Everyone, my main purpose for this visit is to inform one thing, according to the exploration of many of our Dao Ancestors, there is another relic fluctuating somewhere in the Quasi-Dao Realm, and it is estimated that it will not be long before that ruin will be born! This time the ruins are different from usual, this ruins are full of strange aura, and it seems to be an ominous place. And according to our calculations, the Dao Ancestor incarnations cannot descend and enter, and the rules there do not allow strong people above the True Ancestor to enter. "

"Dao Ancestor Yuan, since you don't know the situation of that ruin, why did Dao Ancestor personally come down to inform us of the situation?"

Long Hai Zhenjun asked curiously.

"Because a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Four Transcendent Forces, using the technique of calculation, he has calculated that this relic contains a great opportunity, and it is undoubtedly a real great opportunity for you half-step True Ancestors. According to the intelligence, it is very likely that there are Merge Dao treasures there, and there are almost no major Hedao treasures with few sequelae, and there are more than one of them! Your task is to enter that ruin, seize as many Merge Dao treasures as possible, and cultivate more Dao Ancestors for our Void Heaven Lineage!"

Yuan Qi Daozu said.

"What, the Treasure of the Way !!!"

Many half-step True Ancestors were excited.

He's in tune!

They were now almost sure to be able to advance to the True Ancestor realm, but they had no hope of advancing to the Dao Ancestor realm.

Although the ancestral monument has nine merger places, how many true ancestors will compete for these nine merger places in the future!

And other Merge Dao treasures, such as the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar in Ye Tian's hand, although they can also be used to Merge Dao, the restrictions are too great, and once they are used, they are equivalent to being bound by the Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

Therefore, these treasures with big flaws are attractive to some true monarchs, but they dare not use them on themselves.

But there are no defective Hedao treasures, the value is too great, and they naturally want them one by one.

However, they have hardly heard of this kind of merit treasure, and some people may have obtained it, but no one is willing to reveal it.

Now, the ruins of many Hedao treasures have appeared, which is a great opportunity for them!

At this time, the words of the Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor made many half-step True Ancestors solemn: "Don't think that you can obtain the Hedao treasure by entering it, the major forces will inevitably fight wildly when they enter it, and there is a great possibility of falling." Moreover, it is highly likely that this ruin hides living Realm creatures. Even if you encounter a true ancestor who has forcibly awakened, then the possibility exists!"

When everyone heard this, they calmed down.

Oh, yes!

There are treasures, but you must also have the strength to obtain them, otherwise the treasures cannot be obtained, and your life may be lost.

"Remember, this matter is only for you to know, and you are not allowed to tell non-half-step True Ancestor disciples and others. This opportunity is only open to half-step True Ancestors. If the True Monarch and the Heavenly Monarch also enter, it would be easy for the number of people to cause unknown changes. Moreover, the major forces don't want the True Monarch that they have cultivated with great difficulty to fall too much. Last time, the true monarchs of the major forces fell too much in the battlefield relics, and now although they have made up for it a lot, the growth rate of many true monarchs is too slow, and the number of true top true monarchs is not as good as in the past. Therefore, this kind of thing, the major forces don't want it to happen!" Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor admonished.

"Yes!"

The people answered.

In this way, this meeting ended, and the half-step True Ancestors left one after another and went back to prepare.

Becoming the Dao Ancestor's wedge, even if it is very dangerous, no one is willing to give up.

And Ye Tian naturally would not give up, he also wanted to enter the unknown ruins.
